title: carex subebracteata
intro: Carex subebracteata, also known as the lesser hop-sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Carex subebracteata include its ability to alleviate digestive problems, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it can also be used to make a poultice or salve for topical application.
